file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env zsh
set -euo pipefail

case "$(uname)" in
Darwin)
  afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Pop.aiff &

  local cmux_bin=""
  if (( $+commands[cmux] )); then
    cmux_bin="$(command -v cmux)"
  elif [[ -x "/Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux" ]]; then
    cmux_bin="/Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux"
  fi

  if [[ -n "${CMUX_TAB_ID:-}" && -n "$cmux_bin" ]]; then
    "$cmux_bin" select-workspace --workspace "$CMUX_TAB_ID"
  elif echo "$VSCODE_GIT_ASKPASS_MAIN" | grep -q Cursor 2>/dev/null; then
    osascript -e 'tell application "Cursor" to activate'
  fi
  ;;
*)
  # Terminal bell — travels through SSH/tmux to the local terminal
  printf '\a' > /dev/tty
  ;;
esac

Now I understand. The `notify.zsh` hook (used by `Stop` and `PermissionRequest`) has cmux `select-workspace` support, but it doesn't have cmux `activate` functionality. Looking at the Ghostty config, let me check what's there.

Actually, let me re-read the user's question more carefully. They say "cmuxのactivate処理がないので追加して" - cmux activate is missing. Let me check what Ghostty has for activation.

Let me look at the Ghostty config and see what cmux activation looks like there.

content.content:
commit 9a7e96927d381620c8957d5c325081722a0dc9df
Author: yutakobayashidev <hi@yutakobayashi.com>
Date:   Tue Mar 3 04:00:33 2026 +0900

    feat(hooks): use cmux for tab-aware notifications instead of Ghostty activate
    
    When running inside cmux, notification hooks now focus the specific
    workspace tab via `cmux select-workspace` and send notifications with
    `cmux notify`. Falls back to existing Ghostty/Cursor behavior otherwise.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
    Entire-Checkpoint: 7ca19d600155

 claude/hooks/notify.zsh                   | 4 +++-
 nix/modules/home/programs/claude-code.nix | 2 +-
 2 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

content.content:
cmux - control cmux via Unix socket

Usage:
  cmux [--socket PATH] [--window WINDOW] [--password PASSWORD] [--json] [--id-format refs|uuids|both] [--version] <command> [options]

Handle Inputs:
  For most v2-backed commands you can use UUIDs, short refs (window:1/workspace:2/pane:3/surface:4), or indexes.
  `tab-action` also accepts `tab:<n>` in addition to `surface:<n>`.
  Output defaults to refs; pass --id-format uuids or --id-format both to include UUIDs.

Socket Auth:
  --password takes precedence, then CMUX_SOCKET_PASSWORD env var, then keychain password saved in Settings.

Commands:
  version
  ping
  capabilities
  identify [--workspace <id|ref|index>] [--surface <id|ref|index>] [--no-caller]
  list-windows
  current-window
  new-window
  focus-window --window <id>
  close-window --window <id>
  move-workspace-to-window --workspace <id|ref> --window <id|ref>
  reorder-workspace --workspace <id|ref|index> (--index <n> | --before <id|ref|index> | --after <id|ref|index>) [--window <id|ref|index>]
  workspace-action --action <name> [--workspace <id|ref|index>] [--title <text>]
  list-workspaces
  new-workspace [--command <text>]
  new-split <left|right|up|down> [--workspace <id|ref>] [--surface <id|ref>] [--panel <id|ref>]
  list-panes [--workspace <id|ref>]
  list-pane-surfaces [--workspace <id|ref>] [--pane <id|ref>]
  focus-pane --pane <id|ref> [--workspace <id|ref>]
  new-pane [--type <terminal|browser>] [--direction <left|right|up|down>] [--workspace <id|ref>] [--url <url>]
  new-surface [--type <terminal|browser>] [--pane <id|ref>] [--workspace <id|ref>] [--url <url>]
  close-surface [--surface <id|ref>] [--workspace <id|ref>]
  move-surface --surface <id|ref|index> [--pane <id|ref|index>] [--workspace <id|ref|index>] [--window <id|ref|index>] [--before <id|ref|index>] [--after <id|ref|index>] [--index <n>] [--focus <true|false>]
  reorder-surface --surface <id|ref|index> (--index <n> | --before <id|ref|index> | --after <id|ref|index>)
  tab-action --action <name> [--tab <id|ref|index>] [--surface <id|ref|index>] [--workspace <id|ref|index>] [--title <text>] [--url <url>]
  rename-tab [--workspace <id|ref>] [--tab <id|ref>] [--surface <id|ref>] <title>
  drag-surface-to-split --surface <id|ref> <left|right|up|down>
  refresh-surfaces
  surface-health [--workspace <id|ref>]
  trigger-flash [--workspace <id|ref>] [--surface <id|ref>]
  list-panels [--workspace <id|ref>]
  focus-panel --panel <id|ref> [--workspace <id|ref>]
  close-workspace --workspace <id|ref>
  select-workspace --workspace <id|ref>
  rename-workspace [--workspace <id|ref>] <title>
  rename-window [--workspace <id|ref>] <title>
  current-workspace

content.text:
`set-app-focus` が cmux の activate 相当のコマンドですね。現状の `notify.zsh` では `select-workspace` でタブをフォーカスしていますが、cmux アプリ自体をアクティブにする `set-app-focus active` が抜けています。

`select-workspace` の前に `set-app-focus active` を追加します。

content.content: The file /Users/yuta/ghq/github.com/yutakobayashidev/dotnix/claude/hooks/notify.zsh has been updated successfully.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env zsh
set -euo pipefail

case "$(uname)" in
Darwin)
  afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Pop.aiff &

  local cmux_bin=""
  if (( $+commands[cmux] )); then
    cmux_bin="$(command -v cmux)"
  elif [[ -x "/Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux" ]]; then
    cmux_bin="/Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux"
  fi

  if [[ -n "${CMUX_TAB_ID:-}" && -n "$cmux_bin" ]]; then
    "$cmux_bin" select-workspace --workspace "$CMUX_TAB_ID"
  elif echo "$VSCODE_GIT_ASKPASS_MAIN" | grep -q Cursor 2>/dev/null; then
    osascript -e 'tell application "Cursor" to activate'
  fi
  ;;
*)
  # Terminal bell — travels through SSH/tmux to the local terminal
  printf '\a' > /dev/tty
  ;;
esac

content.text: 同じく `Notification` hookのインラインコマンドにも追加します。

input.new_string: command = "CMUX_BIN=\"\"; if command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1; then CMUX_BIN=cmux; elif [ -x /Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux ]; then CMUX_BIN=/Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux; fi; if [ -n \"$CMUX_TAB_ID\" ] && [ -n \"$CMUX_BIN\" ]; then \"$CMUX_BIN\" set-app-focus active; \"$CMUX_BIN\" select-workspace --workspace \"$CMUX_TAB_ID\" && ${jq} -r '.message' | xargs -I {} \"$CMUX_BIN\" notify --title \"Claude Code\" --body \"{}\" --tab \"$CMUX_TAB_ID\"; else ${jq} -r '.message' | xargs -I {} ${terminal-notifier} -message \"{}\" -title \"Claude Code\" -group \"$(pwd):hook\"; fi";

content.text:
2箇所に `set-app-focus active` を追加しました:

1. **`claude/hooks/notify.zsh`** (Stop / PermissionRequest hook) — `select-workspace` の前に `set-app-focus active` を追加。cmux アプリ自体を前面に持ってきてからタブをフォーカスする流れに
2. **`nix/modules/home/programs/claude-code.nix`** (Notification hook) — インラインコマンド内の `select-workspace` の前に `set-app-focus active;` を追加

これで Cursor の `osascript -e 'tell application "Cursor" to activate'` と同等の処理が cmux 側にも入りました。

  +                command = "if [ -n \"$CMUX_TAB_ID\" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1; then cmux select-workspace --workspace \"$CMUX_TAB_ID\" && ${jq} -r '.message' | xargs -I {} cmux notify --title \"Claude Code\" --body \"{}\" --tab \"$CMUX_TAB_ID\"; else ${jq} -r '.message' | xargs -I {} ${terminal-notifier} -message \"{}\" -title \"Claude Code\" -group \"$(pwd):hook\" -activate com.mitchellh.ghostty; fi";
                 }
               ];
             }
  +1 -1

content.text:
なるほど、元のコードを見ると:

- **notify.zsh**: `osascript -e 'tell application "Ghostty" to activate'` でGhosttyをactivateしていた
- **claude-code.nix (Notification hook)**: `-activate com.mitchellh.ghostty` でterminal-notifier経由でGhosttyをactivateしていた

9a7e969 のコミットでcmux対応に書き換えた際、**両方ともactivate処理が落ちている**ことがわかります。`select-workspace` はタブをフォーカスするだけで、アプリ自体を前面に持ってくる処理ではないですね。

今回追加した `set-app-focus active` で、元々あったGhostty activate相当の処理が復元されます。diff は先ほど確認した通りです。

input.command:
git add claude/hooks/notify.zsh nix/modules/home/programs/claude-code.nix && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(hooks): restore app activation for cmux notifications

The 9a7e969 commit replaced Ghostty activate with cmux select-workspace
but dropped the app-level focus. Add `cmux set-app-focus active` before
select-workspace to bring cmux to the foreground, matching the original
Ghostty activate behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
